Product Details
Spring-Energized Seals

PTFE-based sealing solutions energized by internal springs for demanding dynamic and static sealing conditions.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Spring-Energized Seals

Suitable for low-friction movement, aggressive media, and applications where wide operating windows are required.

Spring-Energized Seals use PTFE-based jackets with metallic spring energizers to maintain sealing force, chemical compatibility, and reliable performance under demanding service conditions.

Low Friction

Supports precision motion systems that require smooth startup and stable running behavior.

Chemical Resistance

PTFE-based jackets help the seal handle a broad range of chemicals and process media.

Demanding Service

Commonly selected for high-end equipment in energy, semiconductor, and process industries.
